requirement: Non-assistive hands-off builds ONE continuous transcript across the whole session (append, not per-utterance replace)
source_section: Faza 1 / Co musi sie stac: append_mode wlaczone dla calego nagrania
positive: Per-utterance callback removed; PresentationEmitter defaults to SessionRendered (cumulative rendered_text()); single transcript_buffer consumed on stop
negative: handle_toggle_utterance removed (0 refs); ActivePreviewOnly no longer set on toggle path
runtime: Operator @02:04: 'dzieje sie w bufferze dobrze, a UI nie jest w stanie dodawac tekstu na koncu ogona' — BUFFER appends correctly, OVERLAY still replaces
note: Backend continuity met; user-visible continuity NOT met. Literal append_mode flag still false (mod.rs:3692); continuity is via SessionRendered, but the rendered surface still presents replacement.

requirement: handle_toggle_utterance (or equivalent) no longer runs a full pipeline pass with replace effect per utterance
positive: Function deleted entirely; no per-utterance process_transcript_text_pipeline dispatch remains on toggle path
runtime: Per-sentence pipeline fragmentation no longer reported by operator (complaint shifted to UI render, not pipeline shots)

requirement: stop path for non-assistive long-form must stop discarding the WAV
source_section: Faza 1 / Co musi sie stac: stop_toggle_recording musi przestac discardowac WAV
expected_code_locations: app/controller/mod.rs:2916 stop_toggle_recording uses stop() not stop_and_discard_path
positive: Non-assistive routes to stop_toggle_and_adjudicate -> _inner uses recorder.stop() returning (text, audio_path); audio_path forwarded to process_stopped_recording. Assistive stop_toggle_recording also switched to stop() and saves audio via history::save_audio
negative: stop_and_discard_path() no longer on long-form stop path (remaining 4 refs are start-flow swaps/cancels)
runtime: Operator @end: 'mamy pelne transkrypcje z trybu hands off' — full session transcript+audio confirmed retained

requirement: After stop: one coherent transcript + full audio go to process_stopped_recording (or equivalent)
positive: stop_toggle_and_adjudicate_inner passes full streaming_text + audio path + ToggleSessionAdjudicated source into process_stopped_recording
runtime: Final transcript reaches decision overlay (operator interacts with Format/Copy on full text)

requirement: Overlay shows growing appended text during recording; light corrections allowed; NO mass replacement
source_section: Faza 1 / Co musi sie stac + Niezmiennik 3
positive: Default DeltaRenderMode::SessionRendered renders cumulative rendered_text(); ActivePreviewOnly removed from toggle path
negative: toggle path no longer sets ActivePreviewOnly
runtime: FALSIFIED. Operator @00:19 'efekt zastepywania zamiast apremindowania' [NOT fixed], @00:31 'niezorganizowany i kiepski', @02:13 'nie jest w stanie dodawac tekstu na koncu ogona'
note: This is the central runtime failure: presentation layer (overlay) still replaces instead of appending despite correct buffer.

requirement: Differentiation by post-recording ACTION [Format]/[Copy]/[Agent], not by recording mode; no silent auto-paste/auto-format on toggle stop
positive: PROVENANCE CORRECTED (git blame): the [Format]/[Copy]/[Agent] decision SURFACE (enter_decision_mode 1529, show_decision_overlay 1511, set_transcription_action_contract 4189) is PRE-EXISTING from commit 612c8260 — NOT c3ce222. c3ce222's actual contribution: (1) relabel Save->Format/Augment->Agent + handlers, (2) on-demand request_format_and_paste, (3) auto_paste=false for ToggleSessionAdjudicated (4137, blame c3ce2220), (4) auto-format disable via force_raw toggle_handsoff (3795, blame c3ce2220)
negative: Old labels 'Save'/'Augment' gone (only a comment); onSaveTranscript/onAugmentTranscript removed
runtime: Requirement MET at runtime (operator @01:15 'formatowanie nie dzieje sie automatycznie, to byl wymog' + 'mogles wcisnac format'). BUT attribution to c3ce222 was overstated — surface pre-existed.
correction: Auditor initially claimed c3ce222 'wpial kontrakt' — operator flagged this; git blame confirms contract surface = 612c8260. c3ce222 only relabeled + changed auto-paste/auto-format. CUTOFFFLU: trusted diff+commit-msg over blame.
verdict: STAGE_PASS (requirement met) — c3ce222 credit reduced to relabel+autopaste/autoformat

requirement: Assistive hands-off invokes the agent ONCE on stop with the complete session (single Emil message, not per-sentence shots)
source_section: commit Cut 2 (impl claim beyond minimal ADR)
positive: stop_toggle_recording finalizes bubble once and calls send_assistive_with_agent_runtime a single time with build_assistive_input over full session_transcript; per-utterance finalize loop removed
runtime: PARTIAL. Operator @01:32-02:13 tested Emil append; observed 'efekt jest de facto ten sam, czyli podmianka' — Emil bubble also shows replacement, and send timing unclear ('kiedy bedzie wysylka tego co sie dodaje')
test_evidence: NONE (recorder.stop behind cfg!(test) => session_transcript empty => agent branch skipped)

requirement: NON-GOAL: Faza 2 (Apple Layer 0, Whisper tail patch, lexicon/LLM, paralingual, Final BAM) MUST NOT be touched before operator acceptance of Faza 1
positive: commit asserts 'Phase 2 NOT touched'; diff confined to app/controller + app/ui/overlay + docs
negative: No new Apple engine / tail-patch / layered orchestrator code in c3ce222 diff

positive: Full transcripts retained (R3/R4) and action-driven contract (I04) confirmed by operator
negative: Append-vs-replace at UI NOT accepted; operator verdict @end: 'Sukces ... polowiczny' (partial)
